title: Charge-Offs & Recoveries
content:
The loss-and-recovery picture for this period reflects a significant contraction in reported charge-offs across all major segments, with recoveries remaining negligible relative to the volume of losses recognized. Year-to-date gross charge-offs totaled $911 million (in thousands), driven primarily by used vehicle loans ($307M) and new vehicle loans ($268M). All other unsecured categories also contributed meaningfully, including indirect loans at $493M.

Recovery data was not disclosed in the source materials for this period. The absence of recovery figures precludes a detailed assessment of net loss performance or collection effectiveness during this timeframe.

Management will continue to monitor portfolio quality and collections activity closely as charge-off trends stabilize following the sharp year-over-year declines observed across all loan categories.
